reviews.review_text: their pay to win structure is just ♥♥♥♥, honestly this game is fun in the first few tiers and then you hit the I paid for this ship and its just OP like Valparisio and its basically just restart till you have a battle without them. absolute trash balance in this game

this game is amazing! it has most of the ships from ww1 pre war and ww2 and its really cool and fun to play
( NOT PAY TO WIN BTW)
